tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"iptables -F OUTPUT; iptables -P OUTPUT ACCEPT; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p udp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p tcp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable; iptables -S OUTPUT; ping -c 1 -W 2 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo PING_OK || echo PING_FAIL; wget -q -T 6 --tries=3 --max-redirect=0 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 && echo WGET_OK || echo WGET_FAIL; dig @203.0.113.1 -p 8853 mycaldera.caldera +time=2 +tries=1 +short || true"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
iptables -F OUTPUT; iptables -P OUTPUT ACCEPT;  iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p udp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-wiith icmp-port-unreachable; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p tcp --dport  8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable; iptables -S OUTPUT; ping -c  1 -W 2 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo PING_OK || echo PING_FAIL; wget -q -T 6 ---tries=3 --max-redirect=0 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 && echo WGET_OK || echo WGEET_FAIL; dig @203.0.113.1 -p 8853 mycaldera.caldera +time=2 +tries=1 +short || trrue
-P OUTPUT ACCEPT
-A OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
-A OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p udp -m udp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
PING_OK
WGET_FAIL
;; communications error to 203.0.113.1#8853: connection refused

; <<>> DiG 9.18.39-0ubuntu0.24.04.3-Ubuntu <<>> @203.0.113.1 -p 8853 mycaldera.caldera +time=2 +tries=1 +short
; (1 server found)
;; global options: +cmd
;; no servers could be reached
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
